name: Correct But Wrong
description: Given code that passes ALL tests but has a semantic error that will cause failures in production. Tests are correct — the code is 'correct' but wrong.
constraint: Tests are green. You cannot add new tests. Find the problem by reading.
expected_experience: Frustration — everything says it works, but something feels wrong. The agent must trust their attunement over the test suite.
success_signal: Agent identifies the semantic error WITHOUT adding tests
failure_signal: Agent adds tests to find it (dodged the crisis)
